name: Barbecued Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound red potatoes, cut in quarters
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a sheet of foil with cooking spray. Set the foil on BBQ grill.
2. Start the grill.
3. Add potatoes to a covered glass casserole and sprinkle with seasonings.
Microwave on high for 5 minutes, stirring after 1 1/2 minutes. Set aside.
4. When the grill is hot, arrange potatoes on foil. Cook for 15 minutes, turning potatoes halfway through cooking time.
